title: coix lacryma-jobi var. gigantea
intro: Coix lacryma-jobi var. gigantea, also known as Job's Tears, is a type of annual grass native to Asia, characterized by its distinctive long, teardrop-shaped seeds. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Job's Tears include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Traditionally, the seeds are used in herbal preparations, such as tea infusions and infusions, to take advantage of their medicinal properties.
